feed.title: DzBoom
feed.subtitle: Ent fun channel for super muper dudes

entry.title: Food service arranges for people who come for the fish medicine, Hyderabad

link.title: Food service arranges for people who come for the fish medicine, Hyderabad

entry.content: "Agarwal Seva Dal" is organizing food service at the Exhibition Ground for over 10000 people during the annual fish prasadam in the South Indian city of Hyderbad, Telengana, India. Fortunately, for the last 170 years the Goud family of Hyderabad has been offering an amazing cure based on ‘the wisdom of the sacred sages of ancient India.’ Mr. Veeranna Goud used to distribute a pot of "TODDY" along with white bread to the labourers who had been working hard, making them quench their thirst and also creating merriment in their hearts. He was kind, generous and charitable by nature; he practiced charity by giving to the poor free of cost, a part of what was sold. In the year 1845, a holy man happened to meet Mr. Veeranna Goud. That holy man was impressed with Mr. Veeranna’s nature and gave this secret formula of some miraculous "HERBS" and blessed the well and the place of administration of Bathini Mrugasira Fish. He blessed Mr. Veeranna Goud with this gift and also instructed him to distribute this Herbal food supplement for Asthama patients "FREE of COST" to the sufferers of this dreaded disease. The secret formula of this wonder cure was passed to Shiva Ram Goud who later passed it on to Shanker Goud. Popularity of this cure was greatly gained during Shanker Goud’s tenure. The practice flowed down to the five sons of Shanker Goud. Since then, the formula of the Herbal food supplement for Asthama patients has been found quite effective in providing a complete cure if taken by a patient for four consecutive years. It has been the practice of the GOUD family for the past 170 years to offer this Herbal food supplement for Asthama patients FREE to those who need it. At First this Bathini Mrugasira Fish is kept in the mouth of live Murrel Fish (Channa SP/Ophio Cephalus ), 2 to 2.5" in size and the same is slipped into the mouth of each patient. The fish is slippery, so there is no problem in swallowing it. This lives fish travels, wagging its tail and fins, through the throat and negotiates the phlegm congestion, providing a 100% cure. The wonder Herbal food supplement for Asthama patients of Bathini Goud Brothers is called as Bathini Mrugasira Fish. The importance is of the day and the place as this Herbal food supplement for Asthama patients is prepared with the well water, which was blessed by the holy man who passed the secret formula. The holy man also blessed the place for administration of Bathini Mrugasira Fish, which is "DOODH BOWLI. Keeping in view, the heavy rush and other law and order problems, the Government of Andhra Pradesh has agreed to prepare the Bathini Mrugasira Fish at DOODH BOWLI with the holy well water and distribute the same at Exhibition Grounds. It is also very important that this Bathini Mrugasira Fish is administrated on a particular nakshetra. Bathini Mrugasira Fish is given on MRIGASHIRA KARTHI nakshetra. Exrta doses of Karthi are provided to patients to be taken on three successive Karthis, i.e., Arudra Karthi, punnavasu
entry.summary: "Agarwal Seva Dal" is organizing food service at the Exhibition Ground for over 10000 people during the annual fish prasadam in the South Indian city of Hyderbad, Telengana, India. Fortunately, for the last 170 years the Goud family of Hyderabad has been offering an amazing cure based on ‘the wisdom of the sacred sages of ancient India.’ Mr. Veeranna Goud used to distribute a pot of "TODDY" along with white bread to the labourers who had been working hard, making them quench their thirst and also creating merriment in their hearts. He was kind, generous and charitable by nature; he practiced charity by giving to the poor free of cost, a part of what was sold. In the year 1845, a holy man happened to meet Mr. Veeranna Goud. That holy man was impressed with Mr. Veeranna’s nature and gave this secret formula of some miraculous "HERBS" and blessed the well and the place of administration of Bathini Mrugasira Fish. He blessed Mr. Veeranna Goud with this gift and also instructed him to distribute this Herbal food supplement for Asthama patients "FREE of COST" to the sufferers of this dreaded disease. The secret formula of this wonder cure was passed to Shiva Ram Goud who later passed it on to Shanker Goud. Popularity of this cure was greatly gained during Shanker Goud’s tenure. The practice flowed down to the five sons of Shanker Goud. Since then, the formula of the Herbal food supplement for Asthama patients has been found quite effective in providing a complete cure if taken by a patient for four consecutive years. It has been the practice of the GOUD family for the past 170 years to offer this Herbal food supplement for Asthama patients FREE to those who need it. At First this Bathini Mrugasira Fish is kept in the mouth of live Murrel Fish (Channa SP/Ophio Cephalus ), 2 to 2.5" in size and the same is slipped into the mouth of each patient. The fish is slippery, so there is no problem in swallowing it. This lives fish travels, wagging its tail and fins, through the throat and negotiates the phlegm congestion, providing a 100% cure. The wonder Herbal food supplement for Asthama patients of Bathini Goud Brothers is called as Bathini Mrugasira Fish. The importance is of the day and the place as this Herbal food supplement for Asthama patients is prepared with the well water, which was blessed by the holy man who passed the secret formula. The holy man also blessed the place for administration of Bathini Mrugasira Fish, which is "DOODH BOWLI. Keeping in view, the heavy rush and other law and order problems, the Government of Andhra Pradesh has agreed to prepare the Bathini Mrugasira Fish at DOODH BOWLI with the holy well water and distribute the same at Exhibition Grounds. It is also very important that this Bathini Mrugasira Fish is administrated on a particular nakshetra. Bathini Mrugasira Fish is given on MRIGASHIRA KARTHI nakshetra. Exrta doses of Karthi are provided to patients to be taken on three successive Karthis, i.e., Arudra Karthi, punnavasu

entry.title: JL50 is a high concept Web series: Abhay Deol

link.title: JL50 is a high concept Web series: Abhay Deol

entry.content:
Actor Abhay Deol talks about web series JL50, high concept projects and the OTT space. JL50, also starring Pankaj Kapur and Piyush Mishra, is streaming on SonyLIV.
#JL50 #AbheyDeol #PiyushMishra
entry.summary: Actor Abhay Deol talks about web series JL50, high concept projects and the OTT space. JL50, also starring Pankaj Kapur and Piyush Mishra, is streaming on SonyLIV. #JL50 #AbheyDeol #PiyushMishra

entry.title: #TDF2020 - Stage 15 - Pogačar does it again !

link.title: #TDF2020 - Stage 15 - Pogačar does it again !

entry.content:
Discover the highlights of Tour de France 2020’s Stage 15 - Lyon / Grand Colombier.
Stage Ranking:
1 - POGACAR Tadej (UAE TEAM EMIRATES)
2 - ROGLIC Primož (TEAM JUMBO - VISMA)
3 - PORTE Richie (TREK - SEGAFREDO)
General Ranking:
1 - ROGLIC Primož (TEAM JUMBO - VISMA)
2 - POGACAR Tadej (UAE TEAM EMIRATES)
3 - URAN Rigoberto (EF PRO CYCLING)
More information on:

entry.title: PSG-OM : Villas-Boas parle d’une ‘chance’ pour l’OM

link.title: PSG-OM : Villas-Boas parle d’une ‘chance’ pour l’OM

entry.content: Comment l’entraineur de l’OM André Villas-Boas prépare le Classique contre un PSG qui sera diminué dimanche ? Les réponses du coach olympien.
entry.summary: Comment l’entraineur de l’OM André Villas-Boas prépare le Classique contre un PSG qui sera diminué dimanche ? Les réponses du coach olympien.

entry.title: Evidence Shows Heart Damage In College Athletes With COVID-19

link.title: Evidence Shows Heart Damage In College Athletes With COVID-19

entry.content:
Up to 15% of college-age student-athletes experience heart inflammation after battling COVID-19.
According to UPI, the results of a new study have been reported by sports media outlets for weeks.
The study looked at football, soccer, lacrosse, and basketball players as well as track and field athletes at Ohio State University.
In the analysis, cardiac magnetic resonance imaging, or MRI, revealed evidence of myocarditis in four of 26 athletes.
Myocarditis, or inflammation of the heart muscle, can cause irregular heartbeat and affect the ability to pump blood.
entry.summary: Up to 15% of college-age student-athletes experience heart inflammation after battling COVID-19. According to UPI, the results of a new study have been reported by sports media outlets for weeks. The study looked at football, soccer, lacrosse, and basketball players as well as track and field athletes at Ohio State University. In the analysis, cardiac magnetic resonance imaging, or MRI, revealed evidence of myocarditis in four of 26 athletes. Myocarditis, or inflammation of the heart muscle, can cause irregular heartbeat and affect the ability to pump blood.

entry.title: Portugal - Les 101 buts de Ronaldo à la loupe

link.title: Portugal - Les 101 buts de Ronaldo à la loupe

entry.content: Auteur d’un doublé contre la Suède (0-2) en Ligue des Nations ce mardi, l’attaquant portugais Cristiano Ronaldo est devenu le deuxième meilleur buteur de l’histoire en sélection. Décryptage à la loupe de ses 101 buts avec le Portugal.
entry.summary: Auteur d’un doublé contre la Suède (0-2) en Ligue des Nations ce mardi, l’attaquant portugais Cristiano Ronaldo est devenu le deuxième meilleur buteur de l’histoire en sélection. Décryptage à la loupe de ses 101 buts avec le Portugal.

entry.title: Tirreno-Adriatico EOLO 2020 Stage 4 Highlights

link.title: Tirreno-Adriatico EOLO 2020 Stage 4 Highlights

entry.content:
Lucas Hamilton (Mitchelton - Scott) has won stage 4 of the 55th edition of the Tirreno-Adriatico EOLO, 194km from Terni to Cascia, ahead of Fausto Masnada (Deceuninck - Quick-Step) and Michael Woods (EF Pro Cycling) who retains the Maglia Azzurra, as leader of the GC.
STAGE RESULT
1 - Lucas Hamilton (Mitchelton - Scott) 194km in 4h46’22"
2 - Fausto Masnada (Deceuninck - Quick-Step) s.t.
3 - Michael Woods (EF Pro Cycling) at 10"
entry.summary: Lucas Hamilton (Mitchelton - Scott) has won stage 4 of the 55th edition of the Tirreno-Adriatico EOLO, 194km from Terni to Cascia, ahead of Fausto Masnada (Deceuninck - Quick-Step) and Michael Woods (EF Pro Cycling) who retains the Maglia Azzurra, as leader of the GC. STAGE RESULT 1 - Lucas Hamilton (Mitchelton - Scott) 194km in 4h46’22" 2 - Fausto Masnada (Deceuninck - Quick-Step) s.t. 3 - Michael Woods (EF Pro Cycling) at 10"

entry.title: Indian startups doing excellent work in logistic sector: Piyush Goyal

link.title: Indian startups doing excellent work in logistic sector: Piyush Goyal

entry.content:
Commerce and Industry Minister Piyush Goyal said the Indian startups are doing excellent work in the logistic sectors.
Goyal said, “Indian Startups are doing excellent work in roadways, waterways, railways and all sectors related to logistics. Impetus given to scientific innovations in technology will help us solve many problems, as part of thrust our PM has given to make India self-reliant.”
entry.summary: Commerce and Industry Minister Piyush Goyal said the Indian startups are doing excellent work in the logistic sectors. Goyal said, “Indian Startups are doing excellent work in roadways, waterways, railways and all sectors related to logistics. Impetus given to scientific innovations in technology will help us solve many problems, as part of thrust our PM has given to make India self-reliant.”

entry.title: [FULL] Bareskrim Ungkap Modus Penipuan Pembelian Ventilator Covid-19 Jaringan Internasional

link.title: [FULL] Bareskrim Ungkap Modus Penipuan Pembelian Ventilator Covid-19 Jaringan Internasional

entry.content:
JAKARTA, KOMPAS.TV - Bareskrim Polri merilis kasus penipuan sindikat internasional terkait pembelanjaan ventilator dan monitor Covid-19.
Total, barang bukti yang disita sebanyak 3,6 juta euro atau sebanyak Rp 56,8 milliar.
"Saya akan menyampaikan rilis terkait pengungkapan kasus penipuan, tekait dengan pembelian ventilator dan monitor Covid-19. Antara perusahan Italia dan China yang dilakukan para pelaku yang bekerja sama dengan sindikat Nigeria dan Indonesia." ungkap Komjen Pol Listyo Sigit Prabowo.
Barang bukti uang yang disita oleh kepolisian itu ditunjukkan saat rilis pengungkapan kasus di Gedung Bareskrim Polri, Jakarta Selatan pada Senin (7/9/2020).
"Dari kegiatan tersebut kita telah mengamankan uang pada rekening penampungan senilai 56 miliar rupiah, sedangkan 2 miliar rupiah telah digunakan tersangka untuk beli mobil dan aset tanah bangunan di Banten dan Sumatera Utara" lanjutnya.
Kabareskrim Komjen Pol Listyo Sigit Prabowo mengatakan pihaknya telah mengamankan 3 tersangka di tempat berbeda.
"atas kerjasama interpol Italia, Indonesia, PPATK, kita berhasil menangkap para pelaku di 3 tempat berbeda yaitu Jakarta, Padang, dan Bogor." kata Listyo dalam rilisnya.
Kepolisian masih mencari saudara berinisial B yakni warga Negara asing yang juga ikut dalam aksi penipuan ini.
Listyo mengungkap bahwa tindak pidana penipuan dan pemalsuan, dengan modus yang biasa dikenal dengan bisnis email compromize, atau hacking email.
Yaitu dengan cara memby-pass komunikasi email antara perusahan Italia dan China.
Kejadian ini terjadi di kurun waktu bulan mei 2020.
Para tersangka disangkakan pasal terkait tindak pidana pencucian uang dan ITE, dengan maksimal hukuman penajra 20 tahun dan denda sebesar 10 miliar rupiah.
entry.summary: JAKARTA, KOMPAS.TV - Bareskrim Polri merilis kasus penipuan sindikat internasional terkait pembelanjaan ventilator dan monitor Covid-19. Total, barang bukti yang disita sebanyak 3,6 juta euro atau sebanyak Rp 56,8 milliar. "Saya akan menyampaikan rilis terkait pengungkapan kasus penipuan, tekait dengan pembelian ventilator dan monitor Covid-19. Antara perusahan Italia dan China yang dilakukan para pelaku yang bekerja sama dengan sindikat Nigeria dan Indonesia." ungkap Komjen Pol Listyo Sigit Prabowo. Barang bukti uang yang disita oleh kepolisian itu ditunjukkan saat rilis pengungkapan kasus di Gedung Bareskrim Polri, Jakarta Selatan pada Senin (7/9/2020). "Dari kegiatan tersebut kita telah mengamankan uang pada rekening penampungan senilai 56 miliar rupiah, sedangkan 2 miliar rupiah telah digunakan tersangka untuk beli mobil dan aset tanah bangunan di Banten dan Sumatera Utara" lanjutnya. Kabareskrim Komjen Pol Listyo Sigit Prabowo mengatakan pihaknya telah mengamankan 3 tersangka di tempat berbeda. "atas kerjasama interpol Italia, Indonesia, PPATK, kita berhasil menangkap para pelaku di 3 tempat berbeda yaitu Jakarta, Padang, dan Bogor." kata Listyo dalam rilisnya. Kepolisian masih mencari saudara berinisial B yakni warga Negara asing yang juga ikut dalam aksi penipuan ini. Listyo mengungkap bahwa tindak pidana penipuan dan pemalsuan, dengan modus yang biasa dikenal dengan bisnis email compromize, atau hacking email. Yaitu dengan cara memby-pass komunikasi email antara perusahan Italia dan China. Kejadian ini terjadi di kurun waktu bulan mei 2020. Para tersangka disangkakan pasal terkait tindak pidana pencucian uang dan ITE, dengan maksimal hukuman penajra 20 tahun dan denda sebesar 10 miliar rupiah.

entry.title: Tour de France 2020 - Julien Jurdie : ‘Forcément, il y a un stress qui s’installe’

link.title: Tour de France 2020 - Julien Jurdie : ‘Forcément, il y a un stress qui s’installe’

entry.content: Julien Jurdie, le directeur sportif de l’équipe AG2R La Mondiale, est revenu sur le test positif au Covid-19 d’un membre de son staff. Si un deuxième cas se déclare dans le sept prochains jours au sein de l’équipe française, cette dernière sera tout simplement exclue du Tour.
entry.summary: Julien Jurdie, le directeur sportif de l’équipe AG2R La Mondiale, est revenu sur le test positif au Covid-19 d’un membre de son staff. Si un deuxième cas se déclare dans le sept prochains jours au sein de l’équipe française, cette dernière sera tout simplement exclue du Tour.

entry.title: Didier Pittet, infectiologue : ‘La friction des mains et la distance sociale sont les outils du succès’

link.title: Didier Pittet, infectiologue : ‘La friction des mains et la distance sociale sont les outils du succès’

entry.content: L’infectiologue suisse, qui préside la Mission d’évaluation de l’exécutif sur la gestion de la crise de la Covid-19, était l’invité d’Éric Delvaux à 8h20.
entry.summary: L’infectiologue suisse, qui préside la Mission d’évaluation de l’exécutif sur la gestion de la crise de la Covid-19, était l’invité d’Éric Delvaux à 8h20.

entry.title: Sushant Rajput Case : Subramanian Swamy का दावा,बोले- सुशांत की हुई ‘साजिशन हत्या’ वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Sushant Rajput Case : Subramanian Swamy का दावा,बोले- सुशांत की हुई ‘साजिशन हत्या’ वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Ever since the death of Sushant Singh Rajput, BJP leader and Rajya Sabha MP Subramanian Swamy said that the actor had been killed. Now he once again said that Sushant was ‘assassinated’. Subramanian Swamy claims that there is so much evidence from CBI, ED and NCB that it would be easy to prove it in court. He wrote this by tweeting on Saturday.
सुशांत सिंह राजपूत की मौत के बाद से ही बीजेपी लीडर और राज्यसभा सांसद सुब्रमण्यम स्वामी का कहना था कि ऐक्टर की हत्या हुई है। अब उन्होंने एक बार फिर कहा कि सुशांत की ‘साजिशन हत्या’ की गई थी। सुब्रमण्यम स्वामी का दावा है कि सीबीआई, ईडी और एनसीबी के इतने सबूत हैं कि इसे कोर्ट में साबित करना आसान होगा। उन्होंने शनिवार को ट्वीट करते हुए ये बात लिखी है।
#SushantSinghRajput #SubramanianSwamy
entry.summary: Ever since the death of Sushant Singh Rajput, BJP leader and Rajya Sabha MP Subramanian Swamy said that the actor had been killed. Now he once again said that Sushant was ‘assassinated’. Subramanian Swamy claims that there is so much evidence from CBI, ED and NCB that it would be easy to prove it in court. He wrote this by tweeting on Saturday. सुशांत सिंह राजपूत की मौत के बाद से ही बीजेपी लीडर और राज्यसभा सांसद सुब्रमण्यम स्वामी का कहना था कि ऐक्टर की हत्या हुई है। अब उन्होंने एक बार फिर कहा कि सुशांत की ‘साजिशन हत्या’ की गई थी। सुब्रमण्यम स्वामी का दावा है कि सीबीआई, ईडी और एनसीबी के इतने सबूत हैं कि इसे कोर्ट में साबित करना आसान होगा। उन्होंने शनिवार को ट्वीट करते हुए ये बात लिखी है। #SushantSinghRajput #SubramanianSwamy

entry.title: #TDF2020 - Étape 13 Stage 13: Châtel-Guyon Puy Mary Cantal - Teaser

link.title: #TDF2020 - Étape 13 Stage 13: Châtel-Guyon Puy Mary Cantal - Teaser

entry.content:
Get ready for Étape 13 / Stage 13 - Châtel-Guyon / Puy Mary Cantal!
Préparez-vous pour l’Étape 13 / Stage 13 - Châtel-Guyon / Puy Mary Cantal !
Initialement prévu du 27 juin au 19 juillet, le Tour de France se déroulera sur le parcours prévu, sans changement, de Nice à Paris, du samedi 29 août au dimanche 20 septembre 2020. L’accent est mis sur une visite de l’ensemble des massifs montagneux du territoire : l’étalement, la variété et la raideur atypique des ascensions mettront à disposition des grimpeurs ambitieux des opportunités tout au long de l’épreuve, de l’arrivée d’Orcières-Merlette au chrono de la Planche-des-Belles-Filles, en passant par le Puy Mary, le Grand Colombier ou le col de la Loze en surplomb de Méribel.
The Tour de France 2020 defining characteristic is the inclusion of all the mountain ranges in France. The spread-out, varied and exceptionally steep climbs will give ambitious climbers one opportunity after another throughout the race, from the finish at Orcières-Merlette to the time trial on La Planche des Belles Filles, not to mention the Puy Mary, the Grand Colombier and the Col de la Loze, overhanging Méribel.
Plus d’informations sur / More information on:
Hashtag officiel / Official Hashtag: #TDF2020
© Amaury Sport Organisation - www.aso.fr
entry.summary: Get ready for Étape 13 / Stage 13 - Châtel-Guyon / Puy Mary Cantal! Préparez-vous pour l’Étape 13 / Stage 13 - Châtel-Guyon / Puy Mary Cantal ! Initialement prévu du 27 juin au 19 juillet, le Tour de France se déroulera sur le parcours prévu, sans changement, de Nice à Paris, du samedi 29 août au dimanche 20 septembre 2020. L’accent est mis sur une visite de l’ensemble des massifs montagneux du territoire : l’étalement, la variété et la raideur atypique des ascensions mettront à disposition des grimpeurs ambitieux des opportunités tout au long de l’épreuve, de l’arrivée d’Orcières-Merlette au chrono de la Planche-des-Belles-Filles, en passant par le Puy Mary, le Grand Colombier ou le col de la Loze en surplomb de Méribel. The Tour de France 2020 defining characteristic is the inclusion of all the mountain ranges in France. The spread-out, varied and exceptionally steep climbs will give ambitious climbers one opportunity after another throughout the race, from the finish at Orcières-Merlette to the time trial on La Planche des Belles Filles, not to mention the Puy Mary, the Grand Colombier and the Col de la Loze, overhanging Méribel. Plus d’informations sur / More information on: Hashtag officiel / Official Hashtag: #TDF2020 © Amaury Sport Organisation - www.aso.fr

entry.title: Michael Bublé’s beautiful birthday message: ‘You are the most amazing man and father’

link.title: Michael Bublé’s beautiful birthday message: ‘You are the most amazing man and father’

entry.content: Michael Bublé’s wife has described him as "the most amazing man and father" in honour of his 45th birthday this week.
entry.summary: Michael Bublé’s wife has described him as "the most amazing man and father" in honour of his 45th birthday this week.

entry.title: Inde : cette ONG qui sauve les enfants de l’esclavagisme

link.title: Inde : cette ONG qui sauve les enfants de l’esclavagisme

entry.content:
L’ONG Bachpan Bachao Andolan réalise un travail exceptionnel en Inde. L’organisation parvient à retrouver la trace d’enfants esclaves et les libère. Ils suivent ensuite les jeunes jusqu’à leur majorité pour s’assurer qu’ils ne retombent pas entre les mains d’esclavagistes.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: L’ONG Bachpan Bachao Andolan réalise un travail exceptionnel en Inde. L’organisation parvient à retrouver la trace d’enfants esclaves et les libère. Ils suivent ensuite les jeunes jusqu’à leur majorité pour s’assurer qu’ils ne retombent pas entre les mains d’esclavagistes. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: Jean-Yves Le Drian : ‘Il n’est pas question de lever la garde : nous sommes dans une phase, au Mali, où nous avons dessiné une stratégie de renforcement de l’action, qui commence à donner ses effets significatifs.’

link.title: Jean-Yves Le Drian : ‘Il n’est pas question de lever la garde : nous sommes dans une phase, au Mali, où nous avons dessiné une stratégie de renforcement de l’action, qui commence à donner ses effets significatifs.’

entry.content:
Jean-Yves Le Drian, ministre de l’Europe et des Affaires étrangères, est l’invité de "Questions Politiques" ce dimanche.
Plus d’infos :

entry.title: #TDF2020 - Étape 15 Stage 15 - Herrada premier au sommet Herrada first at the top

link.title: #TDF2020 - Étape 15 Stage 15 - Herrada premier au sommet Herrada first at the top

entry.content:
Initialement prévu du 27 juin au 19 juillet, le Tour de France se déroulera sur le parcours prévu, sans changement, de Nice à Paris, du samedi 29 août au dimanche 20 septembre 2020. L’accent est mis sur une visite de l’ensemble des massifs montagneux du territoire : l’étalement, la variété et la raideur atypique des ascensions mettront à disposition des grimpeurs ambitieux des opportunités tout au long de l’épreuve, de l’arrivée d’Orcières-Merlette au chrono de la Planche-des-Belles-Filles, en passant par le Puy Mary, le Grand Colombier ou le col de la Loze en surplomb de Méribel.
The Tour de France 2020 defining characteristic is the inclusion of all the mountain ranges in France. The spread-out, varied and exceptionally steep climbs will give ambitious climbers one opportunity after another throughout the race, from the finish at Orcières-Merlette to the time trial on La Planche des Belles Filles, not to mention the Puy Mary, the Grand Colombier and the Col de la Loze, overhanging Méribel.
Plus d’informations sur / More information on:

© Amaury Sport Organisation - www.aso.fr

L’accent est mis sur une visite de l’ensemble des massifs montagneux du territoire : l’étalement, la variété et la raideur atypique des ascensions mettront à disposition des grimpeurs ambitieux des opportunités tout au long de l’épreuve, de l’arrivée d’Orcières-Merlette au chrono de la Planche-des-Belles-Filles, en passant par le Puy Mary, le Grand Colombier ou le col de la Loze en surplomb de Méribel. The Tour de France 2020 defining characteristic is the inclusion of all the mountain ranges in France. The spread-out, varied and exceptionally steep climbs will give ambitious climbers one opportunity after another throughout the race, from the finish at Orcières-Merlette to the time trial on La Planche des Belles Filles, not to mention the Puy Mary, the Grand Colombier and the Col de la Loze, overhanging Méribel. entry.title: Faux et usage de faux : les députés français ont-ils droit à des masques gratuits ?

link.title: Faux et usage de faux : les députés français ont-ils droit à des masques gratuits ?

entry.content:
La rubrique "Faux et usage de faux" revient sur une information qui a beaucoup été critiquée : les députés auraient bénéficié de masques gratuits.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: La rubrique "Faux et usage de faux" revient sur une information qui a beaucoup été critiquée : les députés auraient bénéficié de masques gratuits. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: British Design Icon Terence Conran Has Died At 88

link.title: British Design Icon Terence Conran Has Died At 88

entry.content:
Famed British designer Terence Conran died peacefully at home on Saturday. He was 88.
After studying textile design in London, Conran founded Habitat in 1964, which went on to become a national and international chain.
Eight years later, the designer opened the first Conran Shop, then opened additional stores in cities including Paris and New York.
Conran founded the Design Museum in London in 1989 and was also a famed restauranteur.
According to CNN, the Design Museum paid tribute to Conran, saying he ‘had a greater impact than any other designer of his generation.’
Terence Conran has filled our lives for generations with ideas, innovation, and brilliant design. He is one of the most iconic figures of post-war Britain. Peter Mandelson Chairman of the Board of Trustees, The Design Museum
entry.summary: Famed British designer Terence Conran died peacefully at home on Saturday. He was 88. After studying textile design in London, Conran founded Habitat in 1964, which went on to become a national and international chain. Eight years later, the designer opened the first Conran Shop, then opened additional stores in cities including Paris and New York. Conran founded the Design Museum in London in 1989 and was also a famed restauranteur. According to CNN, the Design Museum paid tribute to Conran, saying he ‘had a greater impact than any other designer of his generation.’ Terence Conran has filled our lives for generations with ideas, innovation, and brilliant design. He is one of the most iconic figures of post-war Britain. Peter Mandelson Chairman of the Board of Trustees, The Design Museum

entry.content:
Wir fassen die wichtigsten Konsolen-Neuerscheinungen des Monats September zusammen. Welche Titel sich für PlayStation 4, Nintendo Switch und Xbox One lohnen, erfahrt ihr wie immer hier.
Das Video "Games-Release-Vorschau - September 2020 - PC" findet ihr hier:
Bestellt die Spiele direkt hier und jetzt bei Amazon:
Ary and the Secret of Seasons =
Marvel’s Avengers =
NBA 2K21 =
Tony Hawk’s Pro Skater 1+2 =
WRC 9 =
Super Mario 3D All-Stars =
Mafia Definitive Edition =
Untitled Goose Game =
Tennis World Tour 2 =

entry.title: Formation : un embouteillage dans certains secteurs

link.title: Formation : un embouteillage dans certains secteurs

entry.content:
Le système de formation en France regroupe de nombreuses personnes mais beaucoup se concentrent sur les mêmes voies, créant alors un déséquilibre.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
